## What happened

A clear, concrete description of the bug.

## What you expected

What you thought should happen instead.

## How to reproduce

1.
2.

## Environment

- AILA version (output of `git log -1 --format='%h %s'` or `pyproject.toml` version)
- Python version (`python --version`)
- OS and version
- Frontend involved? (yes / no)
- Module involved (vulnerability / forensics / vr / malware / hello_world / platform)
- LLM provider, if relevant

## Logs and screenshots

Attach relevant logs from the API, worker, or browser console. Mask any
secrets, API keys, or customer data before posting.

## Anything else

Additional context, related issues, or your hypothesis about the root cause.
